---
title: Teaching notes
---

These notes help another instructor or teaching assistant run the course.

## Course-level preparation

- Review the syllabus and session notes before the semester starts.
- Run the external checks configured for the instantiated repository after metadata changes.
- Run `make site` before publishing substantial updates.

## Sessions

- [Session 01 notes](notes/session_01.qmd)

## Continuous improvement

After each session, record what worked, what confused students, and what should change next time.
